title: Anvil on a Stick
description: A cheaper alternative to a mace crafted using any anvil and a stick
body:
# Info
Ever wanted to put an anvil on a stick? Well now you can! It works like a mace but it cannot be enchanted and has 300 durability (200 less than a mace).

There are 3 crafting recipes for it, any of the 3 types of anvil on top of a stick. It can be repaired with Iron Blocks in an anvil.

Whenever the weapon goes below 1/3 of its durability, it changes to a chipped anvil item model. Same thing happens at 2/3s durability where it changes to a damaged anvil.

### Recipes
![Crafting recipe with normal anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rsi6OQoP/images/0f90a806ad3edb2ddb557764e820ba61ace92d1b.png)

![Crafting recipe with chipped anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rsi6OQoP/images/1685394ea33b29e756200e32fdef8eeac39d000e.png)

![Crafting recipe with damaged anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rsi6OQoP/images/644b920df4dc2c7076f1ab211be0f218cd0ca449.png)

![Repairing the weapon with an iron block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rsi6OQoP/images/c61aae1e7ba763d0728c269101cb77bf323025d1.png)

# FAQ
Q: I get a missing texture when trying to use this how do I fix it?  
A: Make sure to download the resourcepack

Q: Where can I download the resourcepack?  
A: Those who click the big download button at the top of the screen are only prompted to download the datapack and not the resourcepack. Modrinth does not show both of them in that menu. You instead have to go to the versions tab.

<details>
  <summary>
    Where to download the resourcepack
  </summary>
  
  ### First you have to go to the versions tab

  ![Go to the Versions Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ad57d13fae1d012d90568975a6421626826dfa9.png)
  ### Then you go to the version you want

  ![Go to the latest version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/859f2beded095309e921e06c96eb5d38507018c8.png)

### Then underneath the datapack download is the resourcepack download
![Click the 2nd download button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3734993d8a204a1d6b961ff407408235286f92.png)
  
</details>
